parameters.jsCode:
return {
  productName: $json.productName,
  mergedContext: $json.mergedContext,
  originalTranscript: $json.originalTranscript,
  aiTranscript: $json.aiTranscript,
  
  // Pre-build all prompts here
  prompt_videoSummary: "Based on this product demo transcript, write a crisp 150-200 word video summary. Capture the core value proposition in the first sentence. Mention top 3 things demonstrated. Use present tense, active voice.

Product: " + $json.productName + "

TRANSCRIPT:
" + $json.mergedContext,
  
  prompt_userGuide: "Based on this product demo transcript, create a detailed step-by-step user guide. Include: Before You Begin section, numbered steps with Action/Where/Why for each step, Pro Tips, grouped sections, Troubleshooting section. Written for non-technical users.

Product: " + $json.productName + "

TRANSCRIPT:
" + $json.mergedContext,
  
  prompt_productOverview: "Write a comprehensive Product Overview Report with: Executive Summary, Product Vision, Core Features, Use Cases, Competitive Positioning, Integration Capabilities, Limitations, User Personas, Strategic Value.

Product: " + $json.productName + "

TRANSCRIPT:
" + $json.mergedContext,
  
  prompt_productDescription: "Write a complete Product Description with: Target Client Profile (industry, company size, job titles, pain points), Key Features, Benefits, Unique Differentiators, CTA options (primary/secondary/retargeting), Objection Handlers.

Product: " + $json.productName + "

TRANSCRIPT:
" + $json.mergedContext,
  
  prompt_researchReport: "Write a market Research Report with: Market Overview, Target Segmentation, Competitive Landscape, Market Trends, Customer Pain Points, Pricing Recommendations, GTM Opportunities, Risks, Next Steps.

Product: " + $json.productName + "

TRANSCRIPT:
" + $json.mergedContext,
  
  prompt_communicationStrategy: "Build a full Communication Strategy with: Messaging Hierarchy, Channel Strategy for LinkedIn/Email/Website/YouTube, Audience Segmentation, 3-month Content Calendar Themes, Tone of Voice Guide.

Product: " + $json.productName + "

TRANSCRIPT:
" + $json.mergedContext,
  
  prompt_onePager: "Create a One-Pager Feature List with: Headline, Subheadline, Feature Grid (6-8 features with benefit per feature), Integrations, Key Stats, Footer CTA. Every line must answer 'so what?' for the reader.

Product: " + $json.productName + "

TRANSCRIPT:
" + $json.mergedContext,
  
  prompt_elevatorPitch: "Write a 30-second elevator pitch (75-85 words). Structure: Problem → Solution → How → Proof → CTA. Write 3 versions: Version A for CEO, Version B for VP Sales/Marketing, Version C for IT/Operations.

Product: " + $json.productName + "

TRANSCRIPT:
" + $json.mergedContext,
  
  prompt_industryFeatureList: "Create an Industry-Specific Feature Relevance Map for the top 5 most relevant industries. For each: top 3 relevant features, industry use case, pain point solved, expected ROI, industry-specific CTA language.

Product: " + $json.productName + "

TRANSCRIPT:
" + $json.mergedContext,
  
  prompt_marketingScript: "Write a 45-second marketing video script (110-120 words). Hook in first 5 words. Structure: Problem (0-10s), Solution (10-25s), Proof (25-35s), CTA (35-45s). Write 2 versions: pain-focused and aspiration-focused.

Product: " + $json.productName + "

TRANSCRIPT:
" + $json.mergedContext,
  
  prompt_storyboard: "Create a visual storyboard with 8-10 scenes for 45 seconds. For each scene: Visual description, Camera shot type, Text overlays, Audio/VO line, Transition, Emotion target. Include color palette, music mood, visual style.

Product: " + $json.productName + "

TRANSCRIPT:
" + $json.mergedContext,
  
  prompt_screenplay: "Write a production-ready 45-second video screenplay. For each scene: Location, Duration, Talent description, Action, Dialogue/VO, Technical notes. End with Production Requirements: locations, talent count, props list, effects, complexity rating.

Product: " + $json.productName + "

TRANSCRIPT:
" + $json.mergedContext
};

// Stagger delay - each parallel node waits before starting
const delay = (ms) => new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, ms));
await delay(Math.random() * 5000); // Random 0-5 second delay

return {
  productName: $json.productName,
  mergedContext: $json.mergedContext,
  originalTranscript: $json.originalTranscript,
  aiTranscript: $json.aiTranscript,
  
  prompt_videoSummary: "Based on this product demo transcript, write a crisp 150-200 word video summary. Capture the core value proposition in the first sentence. Mention top 3 things demonstrated. Use present tense, active voice.

Product: " + $json.productName + "

TRANSCRIPT:
" + $json.mergedContext,
  
  prompt_userGuide: "Based on this product demo transcript, create a detailed step-by-step user guide. Include: Before You Begin section, numbered steps with Action/Where/Why for each step, Pro Tips, grouped sections, Troubleshooting section. Written for non-technical users.

Product: " + $json.productName + "

TRANSCRIPT:
" + $json.mergedContext,
  
  prompt_productOverview: "Write a comprehensive Product Overview Report with: Executive Summary, Product Vision, Core Features, Use Cases, Competitive Positioning, Integration Capabilities, Limitations, User Personas, Strategic Value.

Product: " + $json.productName + "

TRANSCRIPT:
" + $json.mergedContext,
  
  prompt_productDescription: "Write a complete Product Description with: Target Client Profile (industry, company size, job titles, pain points), Key Features, Benefits, Unique Differentiators, CTA options (primary/secondary/retargeting), Objection Handlers.

Product: " + $json.productName + "

TRANSCRIPT:
" + $json.mergedContext,
  
  prompt_researchReport: "Write a market Research Report with: Market Overview, Target Segmentation, Competitive Landscape, Market Trends, Customer Pain Points, Pricing Recommendations, GTM Opportunities, Risks, Next Steps.

Product: " + $json.productName + "

TRANSCRIPT:
" + $json.mergedContext,
  
  prompt_communicationStrategy: "Build a full Communication Strategy with: Messaging Hierarchy, Channel Strategy for LinkedIn/Email/Website/YouTube, Audience Segmentation, 3-month Content Calendar Themes, Tone of Voice Guide.

Product: " + $json.productName + "

TRANSCRIPT:
" + $json.mergedContext,
  
  prompt_onePager: "Create a One-Pager Feature List with: Headline, Subheadline, Feature Grid (6-8 features with benefit per feature), Integrations, Key Stats, Footer CTA. Every line must answer 'so what?' for the reader.

Product: " + $json.productName + "

TRANSCRIPT:
" + $json.mergedContext,
  
  prompt_elevatorPitch: "Write a 30-second elevator pitch (75-85 words). Structure: Problem → Solution → How → Proof → CTA. Write 3 versions: Version A for CEO, Version B for VP Sales/Marketing, Version C for IT/Operations.

Product: " + $json.productName + "

TRANSCRIPT:
" + $json.mergedContext,
  
  prompt_industryFeatureList: "Create an Industry-Specific Feature Relevance Map for the top 5 most relevant industries. For each: top 3 relevant features, industry use case, pain point solved, expected ROI, industry-specific CTA language.

Product: " + $json.productName + "

TRANSCRIPT:
" + $json.mergedContext,
  
  prompt_marketingScript: "Write a 45-second marketing video script (110-120 words). Hook in first 5 words. Structure: Problem (0-10s), Solution (10-25s), Proof (25-35s), CTA (35-45s). Write 2 versions: pain-focused and aspiration-focused.

Product: " + $json.productName + "

TRANSCRIPT:
" + $json.mergedContext,
  
  prompt_storyboard: "Create a visual storyboard with 8-10 scenes for 45 seconds. For each scene: Visual description, Camera shot type, Text overlays, Audio/VO line, Transition, Emotion target. Include color palette, music mood, visual style.

Product: " + $json.productName + "

TRANSCRIPT:
" + $json.mergedContext,
  
  prompt_screenplay: "Write a production-ready 45-second video screenplay. For each scene: Location, Duration, Talent description, Action, Dialogue/VO, Technical notes. End with Production Requirements: locations, talent count, props list, effects, complexity rating.

Product: " + $json.productName + "

TRANSCRIPT:
" + $json.mergedContext
};

const items = $input.all();

return {
  productName: items[0].json.productName || "Product",
  videoSummary: items[0].json.choices[0].message.content,
  userGuide: items[1].json.choices[0].message.content,
  productOverview: items[2].json.choices[0].message.content,
  productDescription: items[3].json.choices[0].message.content,
  researchReport: items[4].json.choices[0].message.content,
  communicationStrategy: items[5].json.choices[0].message.content,
  onePager: items[6].json.choices[0].message.content,
  elevatorPitch: items[7].json.choices[0].message.content,
  industryFeatureList: items[8].json.choices[0].message.content,
  marketingScript: items[9].json.choices[0].message.content,
  storyboard: items[10].json.choices[0].message.content,
  screenplay: items[11].json.choices[0].message.content
};

// Stagger delay - each parallel node waits before starting
const delay = (ms) => new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, ms));
await delay(Math.random() * 5000); // Random 0-5 second delay

return {
  productName: $json.productName,
  mergedContext: $json.mergedContext.substring(0, 3000),
  originalTranscript: $json.originalTranscript,
  aiTranscript: $json.aiTranscript,
  
  prompt_videoSummary: "Based on this product demo transcript, write a crisp 150-200 word video summary. Capture the core value proposition in the first sentence. Mention top 3 things demonstrated. Use present tense, active voice.

Product: " + $json.productName + "

TRANSCRIPT:
" + $json.mergedContext,
  
  prompt_userGuide: "Based on this product demo transcript, create a detailed step-by-step user guide. Include: Before You Begin section, numbered steps with Action/Where/Why for each step, Pro Tips, grouped sections, Troubleshooting section. Written for non-technical users.

Product: " + $json.productName + "

TRANSCRIPT:
" + $json.mergedContext,
  
  prompt_productOverview: "Write a comprehensive Product Overview Report with: Executive Summary, Product Vision, Core Features, Use Cases, Competitive Positioning, Integration Capabilities, Limitations, User Personas, Strategic Value.

Product: " + $json.productName + "

TRANSCRIPT:
" + $json.mergedContext,
  
  prompt_productDescription: "Write a complete Product Description with: Target Client Profile (industry, company size, job titles, pain points), Key Features, Benefits, Unique Differentiators, CTA options (primary/secondary/retargeting), Objection Handlers.

Product: " + $json.productName + "

TRANSCRIPT:
" + $json.mergedContext,
  
  prompt_researchReport: "Write a market Research Report with: Market Overview, Target Segmentation, Competitive Landscape, Market Trends, Customer Pain Points, Pricing Recommendations, GTM Opportunities, Risks, Next Steps.

Product: " + $json.productName + "

TRANSCRIPT:
" + $json.mergedContext,
  
  prompt_communicationStrategy: "Build a full Communication Strategy with: Messaging Hierarchy, Channel Strategy for LinkedIn/Email/Website/YouTube, Audience Segmentation, 3-month Content Calendar Themes, Tone of Voice Guide.

Product: " + $json.productName + "

TRANSCRIPT:
" + $json.mergedContext,
  
  prompt_onePager: "Create a One-Pager Feature List with: Headline, Subheadline, Feature Grid (6-8 features with benefit per feature), Integrations, Key Stats, Footer CTA. Every line must answer 'so what?' for the reader.

Product: " + $json.productName + "

TRANSCRIPT:
" + $json.mergedContext,
  
  prompt_elevatorPitch: "Write a 30-second elevator pitch (75-85 words). Structure: Problem → Solution → How → Proof → CTA. Write 3 versions: Version A for CEO, Version B for VP Sales/Marketing, Version C for IT/Operations.

Product: " + $json.productName + "

TRANSCRIPT:
" + $json.mergedContext,
  
  prompt_industryFeatureList: "Create an Industry-Specific Feature Relevance Map for the top 5 most relevant industries. For each: top 3 relevant features, industry use case, pain point solved, expected ROI, industry-specific CTA language.

Product: " + $json.productName + "

TRANSCRIPT:
" + $json.mergedContext,
  
  prompt_marketingScript: "Write a 45-second marketing video script (110-120 words). Hook in first 5 words. Structure: Problem (0-10s), Solution (10-25s), Proof (25-35s), CTA (35-45s). Write 2 versions: pain-focused and aspiration-focused.

Product: " + $json.productName + "

TRANSCRIPT:
" + $json.mergedContext,
  
  prompt_storyboard: "Create a visual storyboard with 8-10 scenes for 45 seconds. For each scene: Visual description, Camera shot type, Text overlays, Audio/VO line, Transition, Emotion target. Include color palette, music mood, visual style.

Product: " + $json.productName + "

TRANSCRIPT:
" + $json.mergedContext,
  
  prompt_screenplay: "Write a production-ready 45-second video screenplay. For each scene: Location, Duration, Talent description, Action, Dialogue/VO, Technical notes. End with Production Requirements: locations, talent count, props list, effects, complexity rating.

Product: " + $json.productName + "

TRANSCRIPT:
" + $json.mergedContext
};
